_note: Computed styles from live /crm/pipeline (logged in). Faithful model for future Supabase.

header.company_select: class 'input' (h~36 border-slate-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm w-[154px])
header.etapas_btn: btn-secondary whitespace-nowrap (border-slate-300 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium)

stat_cards.layout: 3 cards en fila, rounded-2xl border bg-white

column_header: STAGE_NAME (bold) + count badge + Σ€ a la derecha

opportunity_card.container: rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white p-3 shadow-sm  (w~272px)
opportunity_card.title: font-medium text-slate-800 (client/org name)
opportunity_card.avatar: grid place-items-center rounded-full font-semibold text-white  ~22px  bg emerald-600(#059669)  font 9px  (owner initials)
